mapper.select: SELECT *, f_cdnm('LoginModeCode', sys26_login_mode, 0, f_sysdate()) AS sys26_login_mode_nm, f_cdnm('LoginStatusCode', sys26_status_cd, 0, f_sysdate()) AS sys26_status_nm, TO_CHAR(sys26_open_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sys26_open_date_string FROM sys26_login WHERE sys26_login_id = #{loginId}

SELECT sys26_login.*, f_cdnm('LoginModeCode', sys26_login_mode, 0, f_sysdate()) AS sys26_login_mode_nm, f_cdnm('LoginStatusCode', sys26_status_cd, 0, f_sysdate()) AS sys26_status_nm, TO_CHAR(sys26_open_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sys26_open_date_string, (SELECT sys01_company_nm FROM sys01_company WHERE sys01_company_id = emp01_company_id) AS sys26_company_nm, emp01_kor_nm || '(' || emp01_emp_no || ')' AS sys26_person_nm FROM sys26_login INNER JOIN emp01_person ON emp01_person_id = sys26_person_id WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', sys26_open_date) BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('day', #{startDate}::timestamp) AND DATE_TRUNC('day', #{closeDate}::timestamp) AND CAST(emp01_company_id AS VARCHAR) LIKE #{companyId} AND COALESCE(sys26_login_mode, 'P') LIKE #{loginMode} ORDER BY sys26_open_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys26_login SELECT f_create_seq(), #{personId}, f_sysdate(), #{ipAddress}, #{statusCode}, #{loginMode}, #{macAddress}, #{os}, #{browser}
